dosageInstruction.text: Take one tablet daily in the morning

note.text: Partial medial meniscectomy performed. No complications.

coding.display: CBC panel - Blood by Automated count

resource.conclusion: CBC within normal limits. Metabolic panel shows well-controlled glucose and improving cholesterol.

resource.description: Discharge summary following right knee arthroscopy
Annual lab results - comprehensive metabolic panel

note.text: Recurrent right knee pain following meniscus tear. Managed with PT and NSAIDs.
Borderline elevated cholesterol. Diet and exercise modifications initiated. Statin deferred pending lifestyle changes.
Worn during physical activity. Prescribed post-arthroscopy for stabilization.

coding.display: Master HL7 genetic variant reporting panel

resource.conclusion: Three clinically significant variants identified. BRCA2 pathogenic variant warrants genetic counseling and enhanced cancer screening. CYP2C19 poor metabolizer status affects clopidogrel efficacy. MTHFR variant of uncertain significance.

valueCodeableConcept.text: Responsive – BRCA2-deficient tumors sensitive to PARP inhibition
